speaker: MATT
raw_text: To read your book, you're right, you are totally right. Well, I'm going to have you roll initiative, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it a sports mascot? It's a sports mascot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Not that I'd know. Anyway, let's go ahead and jump in this moment. As the rest of the party is sleeping soundly, I would like you, Vax'ildan -

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Remember, I said I was staying up to read my book.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That does hit. With your shield, what’s your AC? It would be 11-13, so yeah, it still hits. So you take 5 points of piercing damage. I need you to roll another constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: And that’s her, the one to the right of me?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, which ones are everybody’s rooms?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is Vex’s room, Keyleth’s, Pike’s, Percy -

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The one that smells like patchouli is mine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Scanlan’s and Grog’s and Vax’s were over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So can I move out of the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I grabbed all my stuff and then I’m going to make my way out.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, all your stuff would be - You have your shield already that you pulled off the side. You can grab maybe one weapon and go. You’re not going to get armor, though.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you grab your mace, all right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You’re in a slip or nothing, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So you’re naked with a shield and a mace.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Do I have my gauntlets on or no?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nothing else. Yeah, your gauntlets are on.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We’ll say the gauntlets were there, you slip them on real fast. As he’s pulled back and trying to pat out the flames, you grab your things and rush through. He does get an attack of opportunity on you as you run out of his combat range, so he’s going to swing at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is going to be a 16.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: First attack, nope, and I need you to roll a dexterity check.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Just as a note, what’s your alignment?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, cool, just checking. All right, so go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I don’t know what it means.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You do know what it means?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean I do not as good damage to him or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold on. I’m just going to roll the first attack, because I’m stupid. Great. 12 for the first because I forgot to Hunter’s Mark him because I’m a genius because I’m just so worked up because my brother’s in trouble.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As a note, your rage would have faded because you had gotten no damage, but you also could have used your bonus action last turn for your rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which I totally whispered, but just not loud enough.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I haven’t been adding for the bracers. Add 4 extra to what I told you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, 20 for the last. I’m sorry, Matt. I’m freaking out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So cruel, so cruel, so cruel.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You rush up in the air, and these were with disadvantage on all the attack rolls because you’re on your broom?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I swear I’ll finish it eventually. I swear, I swear.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll three more dice and we’ll see if I negate any of these. First one is?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: - you feel a presence begin to push into your head. I need you to roll a wisdom saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He smoked both of them, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That ends your turn, Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Trinket’s the best at killing dead guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He is so good at it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone rushes in, the rakshasa glares around.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We’re still on the roof. It’s just Scanlan and Vax down there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I hope he’s got a Counterspell...

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: He doesn’t know where it’s coming. Right? (high-pitched) Right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (singing) When you’re a Jet, you’re a Jet all the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It’s a Beautiful Mind moment right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: He does want to join Vox Monica.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is what it's like on this end, going, "what the fuck do I do?" Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You know, there’s a mathematical equation for your stripes?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, he reads thoughts but he gets them backwards, sometimes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He’s thinking about that great Loot Crate deal.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: How many people will die instantly

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: - if I set off a thermonuclear bomb in my pocket?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So. Hotis, first, is going to... reach back and pull out - no actually, no. Hotis is going to look up at the creature that just flew in on the broom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looks at you and says, "You’ll do."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right as the eye contact hits you -

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He’s going to fucking Finger of Death.
